Title: PDF Merger Application
Description: Develop a web application using React and Flask that allows users to merge multiple PDF files into a single PDF.
Acceptance Criteria: Application meets all functional and non-functional requirements.

Title: Project Setup
Description: Set up the frontend and backend development environments.
Acceptance Criteria: React and Flask projects are initialized and runnable.

Title: PDF Upload
Description: Implement functionality for uploading PDF files.
Acceptance Criteria: Users can upload up to five PDF files successfully.

Title: PDF Merge
Description: Implement PDF merging functionality.
Acceptance Criteria: Uploaded PDFs are merged while preserving page order.

Title: PDF Preview & Download
Description: Allow users to preview and download the merged PDF.
Acceptance Criteria: Merged PDF is displayed and downloadable.

Title: Notifications & Error Handling
Description: Provide user notifications and error handling.
Acceptance Criteria: Meaningful success and error messages are displayed.

Title: Testing
Description: Perform functional and API testing.

Title: As a user, I want to upload multiple PDF files so that I can merge them into one document.
Description: Allow upload using drag-and-drop or file picker.
Acceptance Criteria: Maximum 5 PDFs; Only PDF files accepted; Uploaded files displayed.

Title: As a user, I want the uploaded PDF files to be merged into a single document so that I have one consolidated PDF.
Description: Merge uploaded PDFs preserving upload order.
Acceptance Criteria: All pages merged; No pages lost; Order preserved.

Title: As a user, I want to preview the merged PDF before downloading it so that I can verify the contents.
Description: Display merged PDF in browser.

Title: As a user, I want to download the merged PDF so that I can save it locally.
Description: Provide download functionality.

Title: As a user, I want to receive a notification after the merge is complete so that I know the PDF is ready.
Description: Display success and error notifications.
Acceptance Criteria: Success notification displayed after merge completes.

Title: Initialize React Project
Description: Create React application using Vite, configure folder structure and dependencies.

Title: Initialize Flask Backend
Description: Create Flask application, configure virtual environment and enable CORS.

Title: Create Upload Component
Description: Develop React component supporting drag-and-drop and file selection.

Title: Validate Uploaded Files
Description: Allow only PDF files and maximum five uploads.

Title: Implement Upload API
Description: Create POST /upload endpoint to receive PDF files.

Title: Implement PDF Merge Service
Description: Use pypdf/PyPDF2 to merge uploaded PDFs.

Title: Create Merge API
Description: Develop POST /merge endpoint.

Title: Integrate React with Upload API
Description: Connect upload component to Flask upload endpoint.

Title: Integrate React with Merge API
Description: Invoke merge API from React.

Title: Display PDF Preview
Description: Render merged PDF in browser.

Title: Implement Download Button
Description: Allow users to download merged PDF.

Title: Display Success Notification
Description: Notify users when merge completes.

Title: Display Error Messages
Description: Handle upload and merge failures.

Title: Delete Temporary Files
Description: Remove uploaded files after merge.

Title: Write Frontend Tests
Description: Test upload, preview and download functionality.

Title: Write Backend Tests
Description: Test upload and merge APIs.
